message:
feat(monitor): add two-factor burst detection to EWMA estimator

Replace single-factor (duration-only) burst detection with a two-factor
system combining magnitude and duration:

- Extreme spikes (>10x median) get immediate strong signal via
  magnitude_weight without needing multiple consecutive samples
- Moderate spikes still require sustained consecutive samples
- Combined weight uses max(magnitude_weight, duration_weight)

Add tests: extreme_spike_detected_on_first_sample and
moderate_burst_needs_multiple_samples.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
